items.title: White House teleprompter operator accused of making $100k off Trump speech bets
items.dek: A White House staffer has been accused of using inside knowledge of speeches to make nearly $100,000 on Kalshi.
items.body: A White House staffer has been accused of using inside knowledge of speeches to make nearly $100,000 on Kalshi.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Fifa 'assessing reports' over Falklands banner
items.dek: Fifa is "assessing the match reports" before deciding whether to punish Argentina after players held a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkla
items.body: Fifa is "assessing the match reports" before deciding whether to punish Argentina after players held a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
items.author: IriLine Desk
